## Crypto\_2.ICreateEncryptedFileParams.keyDerivation property

Optional . If provided, stores the salt and iterations used to derive the key from a password. This allows decryption using only a password (the salt/iterations are read from the file).

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly keyDerivation?: IKeyDerivationParams;
```
